events.summary: Phase 0 Research opened — Garmin Connect health-data integration (Task 10 split, separate-feature per operator decision)

Research approved → PRD. Operator decision: Tier 1 (HealthKit relay) only for v1; Tier 2 direct-API deferred (demand-gated). Both Garmin+Fitbit advance together; shared Data-Sources Settings surface + AIInputAdapter contract.
PRD approved → Tasks. Garmin carries the SHARED foundation (DataSourcesScreen + AIInputAdapter source-detection protocol) that Fitbit depends on. Shared tasks.md approach.

Tasks → UX. ux-spec.md written for shared Data Sources screen; /ux preflight passed (all cited symbols verified: SettingsDetailScaffold/SectionCard/ActionLabel/BadgeView, EmptyStateView, HealthKitService.isAuthorized, AIInputAdapter + tokens). Placement: row under HealthDevicesSettingsScreen → dedicated DataSourcesScreen. T6 done.

UX → Implement. Built Tier-1 foundation (DataSource model + HealthKitSourceProbe + GarminAdapter) + DataSourcesScreen/Row/ConnectGuidanceView + HealthDevicesSettingsScreen entry row + 5 analytics events/methods + taxonomy rows + 2 device-free test files + pbxproj wiring. Offline-verified: 6 files parse, ui-audit P0=0, screen 0 findings. Full build CI-gated (offline SPM).

Implement → Testing PASSED. PR #705 CI green 16/16 (Build and Test compiled all new code + ran 2 new device-free test files; lint-ios + integrity + CodeQL + pr-integrity all pass). platforms_tested.ios=true. Awaiting Phase 6 review + merge approval.
Phase 6 complete. UX + design pre-merge-review both passed_with_notes (one Tier-1 state-collapse note; figma deferred_to_prompt for library-only screen). ui-audit P0=0; PR #705 CI 17/17 green.
Phase 7 (merge) opened — PR #705 ready, awaiting operator per-PR merge approval.
Phase 9 CLOSED via close-feature.py. PR #705 squashed onto main as c8ba2993bf (operator-merged 2026-06-12T19:11:27Z). state.json merge→complete with full audit transitions + merge metadata.
